name: High Risk Vendors PCI DSS Compliance
description: Ensures high-risk vendors processing cardholder data have PCI DSS compliance documentation
query: SELECT id, name, risk_level, processes_cardholder_data FROM vendors WHERE processes_cardholder_data = true AND risk_level = 'high' AND (pci_aoc_date IS NULL OR pci_aoc_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Obtain current PCI DSS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) from all high-risk vendors that process cardholder data.
